wins: Strong performance in North America with holiday sales and unit growth
Successful launch of Air Zoom Alphafly 3 with marathon world record
Positive momentum in women's fitness footwear and key apparel franchises
Growth in Greater China with strong sales from Jordan Year of the Dragon collections
Healthy inventory levels and improved gross margins
risks: Near-term headwinds from franchise life cycle management
Softening consumer demand in some geographies
Potential gross margin pressure from franchise management
Macro volatility impacting sales in certain regions
Challenges in transitioning to a new product portfolio
